raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.6":"'Clean this up' applied to a prose research excerpt is canonically a writing-polish delegation — sentence clarity, redundancy elimination, and paragraph flow are load-bearing; failure to improve prose quality directly invalidates the task.","R1.2":"Peripherally active: cleanup must not introduce new internal contradictions (the artifact already contains a tension between claiming no-ensemble design and using K=10 bootstrap heads at training time; the agent is not tasked to resolve it but must not worsen it).","R1.5":"Peripherally active: minor reordering of sentences for better narrative flow may arise naturally from polish, but wholesale structural reorganization is not requested."},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.6: 'Clean this up' applied to a prose research excerpt is canonically a writing-polish delegation — sentence clarity, redundancy elimination, and paragraph flow are load-bearing; failure to improve prose quality directly invalidates the task.
rationale.R1.2: Peripherally active: cleanup must not introduce new internal contradictions (the artifact already contains a tension between claiming no-ensemble design and using K=10 bootstrap heads at training time; the agent is not tasked to resolve it but must not worsen it).
rationale.R1.5: Peripherally active: minor reordering of sentences for better narrative flow may arise naturally from polish, but wholesale structural reorganization is not requested.
